name: @friendlyrobot/discord-pi-agent
description: Reusable Discord gateway bridge for persistent pi agent sessions

scripts.update-deps: bun add @mariozechner/pi-ai@latest @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent@latest marked@latest discord.js@latest dotenv@latest prettier@latest; bun add -d @types/node@latest typescript@latest vitest@latest @vitest/ui@latest
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --packages external && tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --declarationMap false
